name: exif
title: exif
summary: command-line utility to show EXIF information in JPEG files
description:
command-line utility to show EXIF information in JPEG files
Most digital cameras produce EXIF files, which are JPEG files with
extra tags that contain information about the image.
.
'exif' is a small command-line utility to show EXIF information hidden
in JPEG files.

commands.name: exif
commands.description: shows EXIF information in JPEG files
